creator: patrick.mcgleenon@owmobility.com
text:
I have the same issue with FreeBSD 11.1 on HP bl460 blades and the 10Gb/s BCM57711E


bxe0: <QLogic NetXtreme II BCM57711E 10GbE (A0) BXE v:1.78.90
bxe0: PCI BAR0 [10] memory allocated: 0xfb800000-0xfbffffff (8388608) -> 0xfffff
800fb800000
bxe0: PCI BAR2 [18] memory allocated: 0xfb000000-0xfb7fffff (8388608) -> 0xfffff
800fb000000
bxe0: ERROR: Invalid VLAN (57005)
bxe0: ERROR: Enumerated function 0 is marked as hidden
bxe0: Found 10GBase-CX4 media.
bxe0: IFMEDIA flags : 20
bxe0: Using defaults for TSO: 65518/35/2048
bxe0: Ethernet address: de:ad:de:ad:de:ad
bxe0: MSI-X vectors Requested 5 and Allocated 5
bxe1: <QLogic NetXtreme II BCM57711E 10GbE (A0) BXE v:1.78.90
bxe1: PCI BAR0 [10] memory allocated: 0xfa800000-0xfaffffff (8388608) -> 0xfffff
800fa800000
bxe1: PCI BAR2 [18] memory allocated: 0xfa000000-0xfa7fffff (8388608) -> 0xfffff
800fa000000
bxe1: ERROR: mf_mode=SD functions 1 and 3 have the same ovlan (0)
bxe1: ERROR: No Ethernet address programmed!
bxe1: Found 10GBase-CX4 media.
bxe1: IFMEDIA flags : 20
bxe1: Using defaults for TSO: 65518/35/2048
bxe1: MSI-X vectors Requested 5 and Allocated 5


# ifconfig
bxe0: flags=8843<UP,BROADCAST,RUNNING,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1500
        options=527b8<VLAN_MTU,VLAN_HWTAGGING,JUMBO_MTU,VLAN_HWCSUM,TSO4,TSO6,LRO,WOL_MAGIC,VLAN_HWFILTER,VLAN_HWTSO>
        ether de:ad:de:ad:de:ad
        hwaddr de:ad:de:ad:de:ad
        inet6 fe80::dcad:deff:fead:dead%bxe0 prefixlen 64 scopeid 0x1 
        nd6 options=23<PERFORMNUD,ACCEPT_RTADV,AUTO_LINKLOCAL>
        media: Ethernet autoselect (10Gbase-CX4 <full-duplex>)
        status: active
bxe1: flags=8802<BROADCAST,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1500
        options=527bb<RXCSUM,TXCSUM,VLAN_MTU,VLAN_HWTAGGING,JUMBO_MTU,VLAN_HWCSUM,TSO4,TSO6,LRO,WOL_MAGIC,VLAN_HWFILTER,VLAN_HWTSO>
        ether 00:00:00:00:00:00
        nd6 options=29<PERFORMNUD,IFDISABLED,AUTO_LINKLOCAL>
        media: Ethernet autoselect (none)
lo0: flags=8049<UP,LOOPBACK,RUNNING,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 16384
        options=600003<RXCSUM,TXCSUM,RXCSUM_IPV6,TXCSUM_IPV6>
        inet6 ::1 prefixlen 128 
        inet6 fe80::1%lo0 prefixlen 64 scopeid 0x3 
        inet 127.0.0.1 netmask 0xff000000 
        nd6 options=21<PERFORMNUD,AUTO_LINKLOCAL>
        groups: lo
